## Checklist

- [ ] `gofmt -l .` reports no files
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes (add `-race` for concurrency-sensitive changes)
- [ ] New/changed endpoints match the official docs (https://docs.monime.io/apis) — link the doc if relevant
- [ ] Added/updated unit tests and `httptest` e2e tests
- [ ] Exported identifiers are documented and resource-prefixed where needed
